evals.prompt: We're building a fintech mobile app (iOS + Android) for a startup with a 4-month timeline and a small team of JavaScript developers. Should we use React Native or Flutter? Compare on performance, learning curve, and ecosystem.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend React Native based on timeline and team skills, explain trade-offs, outline startup performance optimizations, discuss ecosystem advantages, mention OTA update strategy

evals.prompt: Design a modular architecture for a 50-screen social app in Flutter. Show the folder structure, state management approach, navigation strategy, and how features stay independent.
evals.expected_output: Should outline feature-based folder structure, recommend Provider for state management, show nested navigation with GoRouter, explain dependency injection, modular testing strategy

evals.prompt: Our notes app needs offline-first sync. Multiple devices can edit the same note. Design how I handle conflicts, sync logic, and data consistency without requiring manual resolution.
evals.expected_output: Should outline local cache strategy, push/pull sync model, conflict detection (timestamp or CRDT), merge strategy, queue for offline changes, test scenarios for conflicts

evals.prompt: Our Android app takes 3.5 seconds to launch; iOS takes 2 seconds. Walk me through profiling, identifying bottlenecks, and optimizing both platforms.
evals.expected_output: Should explain profiling tools (Android Profiler, Instruments), common bottlenecks (initialization, assets, database), platform-specific optimizations, lazy loading strategies

evals.prompt: Set up a Fastlane CI/CD pipeline that builds, tests, and uploads to TestFlight for iOS and Google Play beta for Android on every main branch commit. Show the configuration.
evals.expected_output: Should outline Fastlane setup, build signing, test automation, beta upload configuration, version bumping, changelog generation, GitHub Actions/GitLab CI integration

evals.prompt: Convert this Figma design (50 screens, custom buttons, animations, dark mode) into a reusable component system in React Native with Tailwind equivalents.
evals.expected_output: Should outline design system components, spacing/color tokens, responsive breakpoints, animation libraries (React Native Reanimated), dark mode implementation, component storybook approach

evals.prompt: Design push notification handling for a chat app. Users can be in the app, backgrounded, or uninstalled. How do I route them to the right chat with full context?
evals.expected_output: Should explain foreground/background/killed state handling, deep link strategy, payload design, state restoration, push notification timing, analytics tracking

evals.prompt: Implement biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, Android fingerprint) with fallback to passcode. Show code for both platforms and error handling.
evals.expected_output: Should outline biometric library choice (local_auth for Flutter), permission handling, secure storage of passcode, fallback flow, enrollment check, retry logic
